tagline: Instantly check tattoo ink compliance, find approved alternatives
hero_headline: Is your tattoo ink actually legal where you operate?
hero_sub: Enter your ink brand and location — instantly check compliance status and discover approved alternatives
pains: Regulations shift constantly — impossible to track which inks are restricted in which regions
Ink brands don't disclose ingredients or regional restrictions, leaving you unable to pivot to approved options
You can't confidently answer clients about ink legality without official sources, risking trust and reputation
